requirement_topic.en: Portable Lithium Cell and Power Bank Safety — AZS/IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zh: 便携式锂电芯与移动电源安全——AZS/IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 便攜式鋰電芯與行動電源安全——AZS/IEC 62133

summary.en: Azerbaijan references AZS-aligned IEC 62133 requirements for lithium cell and power bank safety. Although local publication structure differs, import checks in practice rely on equivalent safety criteria for abuse, mechanical integrity, and electrical protection. In-market acceptance is tied to product-level evidence for the exact model variant and may require national authority review for regulated products.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆采用AZS对接的IEC 62133作为锂电芯与移动电源安全依据。尽管本地法规表达不同，实务上仍以过充、过放、短路、挤压和电气防护等安全判据为基础。合格核验通常要求按具体型号提交产品级证据，且对受监管品类可能需要国家机关审核。
summary.zht: 阿塞拜疆采用AZS對接的IEC 62133作為鋰電芯與行動電源安全依據。儘管本地法規表述不同，實務上仍以過充、過放、短路、擠壓與電氣防護等安全判據為基礎。合格核驗通常要求按具體型號提交產品級證據，且對受監管品類可能需要國家機關審核。

standards_or_laws: AZS-referenced IEC 62133 safety requirements for portable lithium batteries
National adoption notices that align with IEC 62133 for import control

summary.en: China baseline is GB 31241. GB 31241 provides a comparable safety baseline for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries, but its test evidence is domestic in framing and must be mapped into Azerbaijan import expectations for each model.
summary.zh: 中国基础为GB 31241。GB 31241为便携式密封二次锂电芯和电池提供可比安全基础，但证据为国内框架，需按型号映射到阿塞拜疆进口审查要求。
summary.zht: 中國基礎為GB 31241。GB 31241為便攜式密封二次鋰電芯和電池提供可比安全基礎，但證據為國內框架，需按型號映射到阿塞拜疆進口審查要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241 — safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment
CNCA safety and product certification practice for charged lithium products

gap.en: Model-level mapping is the key gap. GB 31241 reports may be used as technical support, but Azerbaijan expects local conformity context and import-side validation tied to AZS route obligations and local importer coordination.
gap.zh: 关键差距在于型式映射。GB 31241测试报告可作为技术支撑，但阿塞拜疆通常要求结合本地进口合规环境和AZS流程，并由本地进口方完成对应入境核验。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距在於型式映射。GB 31241測試報告可作為技術支撐，但阿塞拜疆通常要求結合本地進口合規環境和AZS流程，並由本地進口方完成對應入境核驗。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where AZS-constrained import categories require compliance proof for the exact model and safety parameters.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic categories tied to CN safety and certification rules; not in itself sufficient for Azerbaijani import acceptance.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB 31241 reports are useful baseline evidence but are not a full substitute for Azerbaijan in-market safety review pathing. Exporters should align documentation model-by-model and confirm that each battery variant is accepted under the AZS-based route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB 31241报告是有价值的基础证据，但不能完全替代阿塞拜疆本地安全核查路径。出口商应按型号逐一对齐文件，并确认每一款电池变型已按AZS路径接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB 31241報告是有價值的基礎證據，但不能完全替代阿塞拜疆本地安全核查路徑。出口商應按型號逐一對齊文件，並確認每一款電池變型已按AZS路徑接受。
